query:
SELECT 
  p.id as product_id,
  p.name as product_name,
  p.category,
  v.id as variant_id,
  v.name as variant_name,
  v.price,
  v.price_type,
  v.duration,
  v.stock,
  v.is_active,
  v.attributes
FROM products p
LEFT JOIN product_variants v ON v.product_id = p.id AND v.is_active = 1
WHERE p.is_active = 1
ORDER BY p.category, p.name, v.sort_order, v.name
LIMIT 80;
